help.skill_manager.enabled: Enable or disable the Skill Manager feature
help.skill_manager.allow_uploads: Allow uploading new Python skill files
help.skill_manager.read_only: When enabled, prevents all modifications to skills (no upload, delete, or toggle)
help.skill_manager.require_scan: Run a security scan on uploaded skills before enabling them
help.skill_manager.require_sandbox: When enabled, skills can only be executed inside the sandboxed container environment. This prevents direct access to the system.
help.skill_manager.auto_enable_clean: Automatically enable skills that pass the security scan without warnings
help.skill_manager.scan_with_guardian: Use the LLM Guardian to review uploaded skill code for security issues
help.skill_manager.max_upload_size_mb: Maximum allowed file size for skill uploads in megabytes
